name: the --require-complete gate exits 1 when any namespace is un-consulted (the Stage-5 verdict-completeness check)
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --require-complete >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=incomplete' e.txt && echo require-complete-gates 1>&2
